en.title: Training Cycle Halved: LoongForge End-to-End Optimization for GR00T N1.6 Delivers 2.3× Throughput
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: Targeting IO stalls, communication overhead, and inefficient operator scheduling in GR00T N1.6 VLA training, LoongForge applies end-to-end system-level optimizations and achieves 2.3× throughput with a 56.6% shorter training cycle.

zh.title: 训练周期减半：LoongForge 全链路优化 GR00T N1.6 训练，吞吐提升至 2.3 倍
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: 针对 GR00T N1.6 VLA 模型训练存在的 IO 阻塞、通信开销大、算子调度低效等问题，百度百舸 LoongForge 完成全链路优化，最终实现 2.3 倍训练吞吐提升，训练周期缩短 56.6%。

en.title: LoongForge Multimodal Heterogeneous Parallel Training Acceleration: From Problems to Solutions
en.author: LoongForge 团队
en.summary: This article explains LoongForge's heterogeneous parallel acceleration for multimodal training, including heterogeneous TP, heterogeneous DP, full heterogeneous parallelism, and integration with MoE A2A Overlap.

zh.title: LoongForge 多模态异构并行训练加速，从问题到方案的全面解析
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: 本文介绍 LoongForge 在多模态大模型训练场景下的异构并行加速方案，包括异构 TP、异构 DP 和全分离并行三级递进策略，以及与 MoE A2A Overlap 的深度融合。

en.title: Accelerating Multimodal Model Training: A Deep Dive into LoongForge's DP Load Balancing Optimization
en.author: LoongForge 团队
en.summary: LoongForge addresses DP load imbalance in large language and multimodal model training with adaptive data redistribution based on real compute-cost modeling, reducing synchronization wait time and improving large-scale training throughput.

zh.title: 多模态模型训练加速，LoongForge 的 DP 负载均衡优化方案详解
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: 当前大语言模型与多模态大模型训练普遍采用数据并行机制；LoongForge 通过基于真实计算开销建模的自适应数据重分配方案，缓解 DP 节点负载不均并提升大规模训练吞吐效率。

en.title: LoongForge v0.1.0 Release Notes
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: First public release of LoongForge. Broad model coverage across LLM/VLM/VLA/Diffusion, Adaptive FP8, MoE optimizations, and native NVIDIA GPU & Kunlun XPU.

zh.title: LoongForge v0.1.0 Release
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: LoongForge 首个对外版本：LLM/VLM/VLA/Diffusion 四类模态全覆盖，自适应 FP8、MoE 优化，原生支持 NVIDIA GPU 与昆仑 XPU。

en.title: Announcing LoongForge — Baidu Baige open-sources its omni-modal training framework: one codebase for GPU and Kunlun XPU, up to 45% faster multimodal training
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: Baidu Baige open-sources LoongForge — one codebase across NVIDIA GPU and Kunlun XPU, 15%–50% end-to-end speedups on mainstream models, up to 4.8x on DeepSeek V3.2, 90%+ linear scaling on 5000+-card clusters.

zh.title: 百度百舸开源全模态训练框架 LoongForge：一套代码跑通 GPU 与昆仑芯，多模态训练提速 45%
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: 百度百舸正式开源多模态训练框架 LoongForge：一套代码覆盖 NVIDIA GPU 与昆仑芯 XPU，主流模型端到端加速 15%~50%，DeepSeek V3.2 提速 4.8 倍，5000+ 卡集群线性扩展效率 90%+。

en.title: 128 GPUs, 4 days — Baidu Baige powers LLaVA-OneVision-1.5, a new record in multimodal training efficiency
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 pretrained an 8B multimodal model in just 4 days on 128 A800 GPUs with performance rivaling top-tier large models — powered by Baidu Baige's AIAK training framework, the predecessor of LoongForge.

zh.title: 128 卡 4 天时间！百度百舸助力 LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 刷新多模态大模型训练效率纪录
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 在 128 张 A800 上仅用 4 天完成 8B 多模态模型预训练，性能媲美顶级大模型；底层由百度百舸 AIAK 训练框架（LoongForge 的前身）提供全链路加速。
